name: Mercor
description: AI-powered talent marketplace connecting human experts with AI labs and enterprises for data labeling and RLHF.

seo.title: Mercor — AI API / SDK for Developers

when_to_use: Screening and hiring ML engineers and AI researchers faster
Automating technical candidate evaluation with AI assessments
Building AI talent pipelines for fast-growing ML teams
Reducing time-to-hire for specialized AI and data science roles

pros: Large vetted expert network for RLHF
Fast ramp for specialized labeling tasks
cons: Quality depends on match between task and expert
review.verdict: The go-to expert marketplace when you need PhDs or domain specialists labeling at scale.
review.best_for: Frontier labs and enterprises needing expert-grade RLHF and evals
review.not_for: Generic labeling needs where cheap crowd work suffices

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
